name: Consomme Primavera
recipeInstructions:
1. Coarsely chop the onion, celery, 1 carrot, turnip, and parsnip.
2. Place in a large stock pot.
3. Add 1-1/2 quarts water, chicken parts, bay leaf, garlic, thyme, parsley, peppercorns, and salt to taste.
4. Bring very slowly to a simmer; cook for 2-1/2 to 3 hours.
5. Strain through a double layer of cheesecloth. Set aside to cool.
6. Peel the skins off the yellow squash and zucchini, discarding or reserving the pulp for other use.
7. Julienne the peels, remaining 1/2 carrot, and leek into uniform 1/8 in. by 2 in. matchsticks.
8. Place in a steamer over boiling water; cook for 1 minute. Remove and allow to cool.
9. Skim any fat that has risen to the top of the consomme.
10. Return the broth to a slow simmer; cook until reduced to one-fourth its original volume.
11. To serve, divide among four soup bowls. Garnish with the julienned vegetables & mushrooms.
